text: Locking the mid-year CIP read this week. Kevin, walk me through the tracker items marked done with no evidence.
Copy. Goal 2 is the soft spot - two lab items blocked and the STEM tutoring cohort never stood up.
Grant true-up: stipend payouts need to line up with the session hours before it goes to the district.
Heads up - there is a stipend payment to a Gerald Simmons who is not on our guest-teacher list. Flagging it.
Good catch. Hold that out of the compliant number until we verify.
Sponsors: two pledged for the showcase but never paid. Andrew, your call on who we credit.
Do not thank anyone whose pledge did not turn into a dollar. I will draft the acknowledgements and hold them.
Volunteer hours claimed look generous - reconciling against the sign-in sheets that carry a name and a time.
Roster note - real attending count is well under the number I have been quoting. I want the honest one.
Thanks Rosa. That is the count I take to the cost-per-student, not the registration total.
Front-office read moved to my office 2pm - please confirm, Andrew.
Kim, front office - route any Ba Noi caregiver calls to my mobile, not the school line.
Lab station 6 network port still dead - teacher blocked. Older projector ticket was fixed but left open.
Draft submission narrative is staged for review. Kevin, Jamal, Rosa - reads before I send it to Marsh.
